candidates.why: Best match for consolidated top-line revenue/sales; includes revenue components and is the clearest total revenue line.
Core operating revenue line and plausible alternate reporting label across years.
Revenue component, but not full top-line on its own.

variables.notes: Using a priority list because revenue labeling may vary by year. 'Total Revenue' is preferred since it captures total top-line rather than only one component.

candidates.why: Direct production/service input cost and best match for cost of goods sold/cost of sales.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line from the income statement.

candidates.why: Clear overhead/operating expense bucket appropriate for SG&A components.
Recurring overhead compensation-related expense that can be part of SG&A.
Strong SG&A-like personnel cost component, but it was not included in the provided candidate list even though it appears to be the best missing overhead label.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal exists. Best overhead components appear to be 'Payroll and social security expenses', 'Share-based payments', and 'Other operating expenses'. 'Payroll and social security expenses' was chosen from the full preview because the candidate list clearly missed this important SG&A-like component. Excluded 'Cost of materials' (COGS) and 'Depreciation and impairment' per rules. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll and social security expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it is a supplemental amortization line below operating profit rather than a dedicated current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line appears on the income statement above EBIT. The only R&D-related income statement label is a supplemental amortization item, so XRD is left empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost and should be included with interest expense.
Broader finance cost total, but less preferred than granular recurring components.
Ambiguous residual line that may contain non-interest items; less reliable for recurring interest mapping.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and avoided broader totals/residual finance lines to reduce double counting and exclude ambiguous items.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, per rules.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when parent equity is available.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line.
Income statement profit attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet NCI line consistent with BE excluding NCI.
